sources.title: Brand Eating. Your Daily Fast Food Reading.

articles.description:
Wendy's celebrates National Bacon Day today, December 30, 2025, with a deal where you can get a Jr. Bacon Cheeseburger for $0.01 with any purchase.

The offer is available at participating locations nationwide when signed in on the Wendy's app or website.
Wendy's Jr. Bacon Cheeseburger features a square beef patty, two strips of bacon, American cheese, lettuce, tomato, and mayo, served on a toasted bun. Prices vary, but it normally costs $3.49 near me in Los Angeles.
Photo via Wendy's.
Read more at Brand Eating!
articles.title: Wendy's Offers 1-Cent Jr. Bacon Cheeseburger with Purchase on December 30, 2025

articles.description:
2026 is coming in fast, and some eateries are celebrating with promotions for your dining dollars. Here's a list of 2026 New Year's fast-food deals and specials:

- Crumbl - On December 31, 2025, get a 6-pack for the price of a 4-pack.
- Del Taco - Through February 9, 2026, Del Taco is offering a deal where you can get two Grilled Chicken Tacos for $3.
- KFC - Through January 5, 2026, there's a buy-one-get-one-free deal on 8-piece fried chicken buckets for KFC rewards members.
- Krispy Kreme - From December 30, 2025, through January 1, 2026, you can get two dozen donuts for $20.26 at participating locations chain-wide. Choose either two Original Glazed Dozens or one Original Glazed and one Assorted Dozen. The chain is also offering free delivery on orders over $5.
Photo via Krispy Kreme.
Read more at Brand Eating!
articles.title: 2026 New Year's Deals and Specials

articles.description:
The $6 Fish & Chicken Basket is back at Long John Silver's for a limited time at participating locations chain-wide.

The discounted combo meal includes a battered and fried piece of wild-caught Alaska pollock, a Chicken Plank (a battered and fried white-meat chicken tender), a side, and two hush puppies.
Photo via Long John Silver's.
Read more at Brand Eating!
articles.title: $6 Fish & Chicken Basket Returns to Long John Silver's

articles.description:
Little Caesars is offering an online-only, limited-time deal where you can get two large 1-topping pizzas for $4.99 each ($9.98 total).

The offer is $1 more per pizza (i.e., $5.99 each) in a few markets (including California).
You can redeem the offer using the code "PIZZAPIZZA" ("PIZZAPIZZA1" in the more expensive markets). It is only good on the chain's original round crust. The code is a nod to when Little Caesars' signature deal was the "Pizza! Pizza!" deal, which eventually gave way to the $5 Hot-N-Ready promotion, which ended in 2022.
Photo via Little Caesars.
Read more at Brand Eating!
articles.title: Little Caesars Offers Two Large 1-Topping Pizzas for $4.99 Each

articles.description:
Arby's introduces its take on an Italian beef sandwich with the launch of the new Italian Beef Dip. The chain also adds a new Peach Cobbler Roll.

Available for a limited time, the new sandwich features thin-sliced roast beef, Swiss cheese, and giardiniera, served on a warm sub roll with au jus for dipping. It's basically Arby's French Dip, only with the addition of giardiniera.
Prices vary, but the Italian Beef Dip costs $7.19 (versus $7.09 for a French Dip) at an Arby's restaurant here in Los Angeles.
The new Dip differs slightly from the test item from last year. It now includes cheese and lacks the premium top round roast beef that was being tested.



The Peach Cobbler Roll is a new, limited-time dessert that comes two to an order. It features a rolled-up crispy pastry stuffed with peaches, graham cracker, and bourbon vanilla filling. An order costs $2.89 near me.
Photos via Arby's.
Nutritional Info - Arby's Italian Beef Dip (343g)
Calories - 680
Fat - 37g (Saturated Fat - 13g)
Sodium - 2900mg
Carbs - 52g (Sugar - 5g)
Protein - 35g
Nutritional Info - Arby's Peach Cobbler Roll - 2 pieces (105g)
Calories - 350
Fat - 16g (Saturated Fat - 6g)
Sodium - 570mg
Carbs - 46g (Sugar - 16g)
Protein - 4g
Read more at Brand Eating!
articles.title: Arby's Debuts New Italian Beef Dip

articles.description:
Crumbl bakes new Strawberry Brownie and more for this week from December 29, 2025, through January 3, 2026.

With the new year arriving this week, the cookie bakery chain is also offering a deal on December 31, 2025, where you can get a 6-pack of cookies for the price of a 4-pack.
Here's what you'll find on the dessert rotation at Crumbl this week:
- New Strawberry Brownie - A chilled fudge brownie infused with freeze-dried strawberry pieces, topped with strawberry cream cheese frosting, fresh strawberry slices, and a white drizzle.
- Birthday Cake Cookie featuring Oreo - A warm cookie made with Oreo cookie pieces, topped with cake batter cream cheese frosting, more Oreo pieces, and rainbow sprinkles.
- New York Cheesecake Cookie - A chilled buttery graham cracker cookie topped with vanilla cheesecake frosting and graham cracker streusel.
- Nilla Bean Cupcake Cookie - A warm vanilla bean cookie topped with vanilla cream cheese frosting and white sprinkles.
- S'mores Skillet Cookie featuring Hershey's Chocolate - A warm, graham cookie baked with pieces of Hershey's Chocolate, topped with marshmallow mousse, a drizzle of melted chocolate, and graham cracker streusel.
- Milk Chocolate Chip Cookie - A warm cookie packed with milk chocolate chips.
- Waffle Cookie - A warm waffle cookie topped with a scoop of buttercream frosting and served with a side of syrup.
Photo via Crumbl.
Read more at Brand Eating!
articles.title: Crumbl Bakes New Strawberry Brownie and More Through January 3, 2026

articles.description:
Starting Monday, January 5, 2026, IHOP will be offering a deal where you can get free Bottomless Pancakes with the purchase of select breakfast combos at participating locations nationwide.

The chain has not yet revealed which combos are eligible for the promotion (my guess would be the combos that already include pancakes). The Bottomless Pancakes are IHOP's signature Buttermilk Pancakes only.
The Bottomless Pancakes deal runs through March 30, 2026.
Photo via IHOP.
Read more at Brand Eating!
articles.title: IHOP Offers Free Bottomless Pancakes with Select Breakfast Combos from January 5 through March 30, 2026

articles.description:
Krispy Kreme is running a post-Christmas deal where you can get a Classic Assorted or Original Glazed dozen donuts for $12 each.

The discounted dozen is available at participating US locations online and in-store through December 28, 2025. You can purchase up to four discounted dozens.
The chain also has a limited-time, online-only deal where you can get a 24-count box of Original Glazed Donut Dots for $5 when you make a purchase of $5 or more. You'll need to use the code "DOTS" to redeem the offer.
Prices vary, but an Original Glazed Dozen normally costs $21.99 near me in Los Angeles, while a Classic Assorted Dozen is $22.99. A 24-count box of Original Glazed Donut Dots is normally $6.29.
Photo via Krispy Kreme.
Read more at Brand Eating!
articles.title: Krispy Kreme Offers $12 Donut Dozens Through December 28, 2025

articles.description:
In time for New Year's, Taco Bell welcomes the new Confetti Cookie Freeze as its latest flavor of slush ice.

The drink features a vanilla cream soda slushy mixed with rainbow sprinkles, a pink sugar cookie-flavored syrup, and a swirl of vanilla creme.
The Confetti Cookie Freeze is available now for a limited time for a suggested price of $3.69 for a 16-oz regular and $3.89 for a 20-oz large (it costs $3.99 and $4.19, respectively) near me in Los Angeles.
Photo via Taco Bell.
Nutritional Info - Taco Bell Confetti Cookie Freeze (regular size)
Calories - 220
Fat - 1g (Saturated Fat - 0.5g)
Sodium - 80mg
Carbs - 55g (Sugar - 53g)
Protein - 0g


Read more at Brand Eating!
articles.title: Taco Bell Introduces New Confetti Cookie Freeze

articles.description:
As a special for New Year's Eve, KFC is offering a buy-one-get-one-free deal on 8-piece buckets of fried chicken on December 31, 2025.

The deal is available only to KFC Rewards members when ordering online through the KFC website or mobile app at participating locations nationwide. The 8-piece bucket is comprised of fried chicken legs and thighs only (i.e., dark meat).
According to KFC, millions of people order takeout or delivery on New Year's Eve and "fried chicken, bubbly, and caviar have become the high–low pairing of the moment."
Photo via KFC.
Read more at Brand Eating!
articles.title: KFC Offers BOGO 8-piece Fried Chicken Bucket Deal on December 31, 2025

articles.description:
From December 26 through December 28, 2025, Pizza Hut is offering a deal where you can get a free large pizza when you buy any large pizza online at the regular menu price using the code "SUPREME".

The deal coincides with the first weekend of the debut of the new movie, Marty Supreme, which launches on Christmas Day. Pizza Hut is calling it the "Party Supreme Deal."
The deal will be available nationwide at participating locations.
Photo via Pizza Hut.
Read more at Brand Eating!
articles.title: Pizza Hut Offers BOGO Large Pizza Deal from December 26 through December 28, 2025

articles.description:
Snickerdoodle Cookie Hershey's Kisses feature white creme droplet-shaped Kisses embedded with cookie pieces.

A 9-oz bag retails for $5.99, but I received this courtesy of Hershey's.



There was a nice brown sugar and cinnamon cookie smell when I opened the bag.



There were notes of cinnamon and vanilla to give the white creme a snickerdoodle flavor, while the cookie pieces delivered a nice crunch. It was creamy and not too sweet. The cookie pieces reminded me of Hershey's Cookies 'N' Creme, only not chocolate.



When it comes down to it, I like snickerdoodles, and Snickerdoodle Cookie Hershey's Kisses capture the flavor well with some crunch to boot.
Nutritional Info - Snickerdoodle Cookie Hershey's Kisses
Serving Size - 7 pieces (54g)
Calories - 160
Fat - 6g (Saturated Fat - 5g)
Sodium - 35mg
Carbs - 20g (Sugar - 16g)
Protein - 2g
Read more at Brand Eating!
articles.title: Review: Snickerdoodle Cookie Hershey's Kisses

articles.description:
Ahead of the new year and its requisite resolutions, Chipotle is launching its first-ever High Protein Menu in the US and Canada on Tuesday, December 23, 2025.

The new curated menu includes options ranging from 15 to 80 grams of protein per item, including a new High Protein Cup, which is a 4-oz cup of the chain's Adobo Chicken (32g protein, 180 calories) for an average price of $3.82. Also on Chipotle's High Protein Menu are:
- Double High Protein Bowl (81g protein, 11g fiber, 760 calories) - A double portion of Adobo Chicken, light white rice, black beans, fajita veggies, fresh tomato salsa, Monterey Jack cheese, and extra romaine lettuce.
- High Protein-High Fiber Bowl (46g protein, 14g fiber, 540 calories) - Adobo Chicken, light brown rice, black beans, fajita veggies, roasted chili-corn salsa, fresh tomato salsa, and romaine lettuce
- High Protein-Low Calorie Salad (36g protein, 10g fiber, 470 calories) - Adobo Chicken, Supergreens lettuce mix, fajita veggies, fresh tomato salsa, and guacamole.
- Double High Protein Burrito (79g protein, 6g fiber, 840 calories) - A double portion of Adobo Chicken, fresh tomato salsa, fajita veggies, Monterey Jack cheese, and romaine lettuce, wrapped in a soft flour tortilla.
- Adobo Chicken Taco (15g protein, 190 calories) - Adobo Chicken, fajita veggies, fresh tomato salsa, Monterey Jack cheese, and romaine lettuce on a soft flour tortilla.
Photo via Chipotle.
Read more at Brand Eating!
articles.title: Chipotle Unveils New High Protein Menu

From mountaintop views to candlelit classics, each stop brings a unique twist you will still be talking about tomorrow. […]
articles.title: A Food Lover’s Tour of 50 Unusual and Unforgettable Spots Across America
